title: 6× Latency Reduction via Async Redesign
lesson: Sequential IO is always the bottleneck. Profile before rewriting logic.
insight: 78% of the newsletter agent's latency was IO wait from sequential API calls. Switching to asyncio with concurrent.futures brought P99 from 95-120s to 10-15s without touching any business logic.

title: Semantic Cache: 60% Token Reduction
lesson: Most queries cluster. Cache at the semantic layer, not just the exact-match layer.
insight: Analysis of 500 production queries revealed 60% were semantically equivalent to prior queries. A cosine similarity cache with threshold 0.92 eliminated the majority of redundant LLM calls.

title: State Synchronization in Multi-Turn Agents
lesson: LangGraph's state checkpointing is non-negotiable for production agentic systems.
insight: Early implementation used in-memory state that was lost on any tool failure. Migrating to LangGraph's PostgreSQL checkpointer enabled full state recovery — a 0-to-100 reliability improvement.

title: Hybrid Retrieval vs. Pure Vector Search
lesson: Semantic similarity alone misses exact terminology. BM25 captures what embeddings don't.
insight: Vector-only retrieval failed on business-specific acronyms and proper nouns. Adding BM25 keyword retrieval with reciprocal rank fusion improved answer relevance from 71% to 89% on evaluation set.

title: Reflection Loops Eliminate Hallucination
lesson: LLMs don't self-correct unless explicitly prompted to critique their own output.
insight: Adding a structured self-evaluation step after generation — scoring factual accuracy and tone 0-10 — with a regeneration trigger at <7 reduced factual errors by 94%.

title: Pydantic as Architecture, Not Just Validation
lesson: Typed extraction schemas define what the system believes. They are design documents.
insight: Switching from unstructured LLM output to Pydantic schemas eliminated all downstream parsing failures. More importantly, it forced explicit decisions about what information the system actually needed.
